title: From now on

title: The door code
content: Since many people keep forgeting it, I'll send it here: 4444

title: For what purpose
content: For what purpose should we use this app? Reply in comments

title: Deleting comments
content: Concerning the abuse of the 'Delete all comments' button, I decided to make it admin only

title: Troubles with cookies
content: Because some people think I will ignore the fact that you can just change your ROLE cookie value, I decided to make the AUTH cookie encoded and secure.

title: Let's end this
content: I like this app, but it's too vulnerable. I am working on a new one, more secure.
